rule_metadata.author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
rule_metadata.title: Okta Admin Role Assigned to an User or Group

rules.rule_text:
title: Okta Admin Role Assigned to an User or Group
id: 413d4a81-6c98-4479-9863-014785fd579c
status: test
description: Detects when an the Administrator role is assigned to an user or group.
references:
- https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/api/system-log/
- https://developer.okta.com/docs/reference/api/event-types/
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
date: 2021-09-12
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1098.003
logsource:
  product: okta
  service: okta
detection:
  selection:
    eventtype:
    - group.privilege.grant
    - user.account.privilege.grant
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Administrator roles could be assigned to users or group by other admin users.
level: medium
